description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ghcr.io/maxking/mailman-ci-runner Docker image, includes the SAST.gitlab-ci.yml template, and sets the variable SAST_DEFAULT_ANALYZERS to bandit,secrets. Define two stages, quality-assurance and test. In the quality-assurance stage add a qa job that runs tox -e qa. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs tox -e cov-git and publishes the coverage directory as an artifact that expires after 5 days, a released job that runs tox -e py313-django52 and is allowed to fail, matrix jobs test-django42 and test-django52 that run tox -e "py$PYTHON_VER-django42-git" (or "py$PYTHON_VER-django52-git") for each PYTHON_VER listed, and upstream-client and upstream-django-mailman3 jobs that run tox -e upstream-client and tox -e upstream-django-mailman3 respectively, each only when their corresponding $MAILMANCLIENT_COMMIT_SHA or $DJANGO_MAILMAN3_COMMIT_SHA variable is set.
